response.step_by_step_log: The video features a virtual stage performance by FUWAMOCO. On-screen text at 00:47 indicates the song title is 'side by side', with lyrics by Kris Roche and music by Aiobahn +81. The performers are FUWAMOCO. I searched for 'side by side FUWAMOCO lyrics' and 'side by side Kris Roche lyrics'. The song is in English. While I confirmed the song title and credits, full lyrics were not found on standard lyric databases, as it appears to be a new or niche track. I have transcribed the lyrics from the on-screen captions in the video to fulfill the requirement for 'reference_lyrics_og'. Since the song is originally in English, 'reference_lyrics_en' is identical.
response.global_summary: A virtual concert performance of the song 'side by side' by the VTuber duo FUWAMOCO, featuring choreography and a high-energy stage production.

scenes.description: FUWAMOCO performs the song 'side by side' on a virtual concert stage with colorful lights, bubbles, and holographic graphics.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Finally we made it through but not without some tears
With the help of friends so true we faced all of our fears
Now we're here to celebrate all that we have done
I can feel it's more than just a game of fate 'cause our stories have just begun
Hand in hand we're not waiting on tomorrow
From now on it's the heart that we will follow
We'll move on past the heartbreak and the sorrow if you stay by my side
Dancing, harmonies feeding the music as we come alive and sparks ignite
We're making memories everyday underneath the summer sky and through the night
We're singing melodies every time we hear music from inside as hearts collide
Bringing out the best in each other, now we're feeling free like we're meant to be
